_comment: 해외 외신 수집 토픽. category=화면 카테고리, query=GNews 검색식(OR/AND/따옴표 지원), firms=제목·요약에서 태그할 브로커명(선택). 자유롭게 편집하세요.

topics.label: 리테일브로커
topics.query: "Charles Schwab" OR "Robinhood" OR "Interactive Brokers" OR "Webull" OR "E*Trade" OR "Fidelity brokerage"

topics.label: 업계테마
topics.query: ("fractional shares" OR "24-hour trading" OR "zero commission" OR "tokenized stocks" OR "tokenization" OR "AI trading") AND (brokerage OR broker OR investing OR stock)

topics.label: 거래소·규제
topics.query: (SEC OR FINRA OR Nasdaq OR NYSE) AND (brokerage OR "online broker" OR "retail trading" OR "trading app" OR "retail investor")
